draft_prompts.planner: Develop a step-by-step plan for reproducing 'Bbox': The BBOX-ADAPTER approach, considering its 9 major phases and 421 subtasks. Ensure that each phase is well-defined and feasible to execute.
draft_prompts.experiment_designer: Create a detailed design for replicating the experiments in 'Bbox': The BBOX-ADAPTER approach, focusing on setting up evaluation environments and datasets for GPT-3.5 Turbo and Mixtral-8x7B.
draft_prompts.code_generator: Write the required code to implement Algorithm 1 (Online Adaptation) and configure baseline models for evaluations in 'Bbox': The BBOX-ADAPTER approach.
